runTitle: Local validation - ai proxy runtime env refresh and README QA sync

completedImprovements.title: Cloud Run proxy runtime env refresh
completedImprovements.evidence: proxy.ts now resolves Cloud Run/local Docker env on each call, and proxy.test.ts covers same-module env changes without reset

completedImprovements.title: README QA evidence snapshot sync
completedImprovements.evidence: README latest snapshot and validation evidence sections now distinguish latest recorded QA (local) vs latest production QA

notes: Commands: npx vitest run src/lib/ai-proxy/proxy.test.ts src/lib/ai-proxy/cloud-run-config.test.ts --config config/testing/vitest.config.node.ts
Commands: npm run test:quick, npm run lint, npm run type-check
Official docs reviewed: Next.js environment variables, route handlers, after, Playwright testing guidance
This run validates runtime env drift resistance and documentation parity, not browser-level product behavior.
